description: classifyCurrentSession at classify-current-session.ts:24-28 accepts an optional third parameter 'isEmpty: (note: Note) => boolean' with a default implementation. REQ-EPNS-007 specifies the function signature as '(EditingSessionState, Note | null) -> CurrentSessionDecision' with zero port dependencies. The third parameter breaches the pure function contract in two ways: (1) The caller can inject an isEmpty function with side effects, making the function impure at the type level. (2) The default isEmpty implementation at line 71 is a private reimplementation of NoteOps.isEmpty, creating hidden coupling to a specific string-trimming algorithm that may diverge from the canonical NoteOps.isEmpty. The spec says 'classifyCurrentSession accepts EditingSessionState and Note | null as inputs; it calls no ports' -- an injected isEmpty IS a port dependency.
specReference: REQ-EPNS-007: classifyCurrentSession accepts (EditingSessionState, Note | null); it calls no ports.
